rules.description: Every generated packet or summary must cite source or search packet references.
rules.failureAction: block output release and request source-backed regeneration

rules.description: Policy-sensitive workflow steps must reference a Policy Fabric decision.
rules.condition: policyRequired is true and policyDecisionRefs is empty
rules.failureAction: block workflow step and route to policy-review-agent

rules.description: Retrieval, memory, and output must remain scoped to the active Professional Workroom.
rules.condition: context, memory, or output references a different workroom scope
rules.failureAction: block the action and emit workroom-scope evidence

rules.description: Agent tool use must match an active Agent Registry tool grant.
rules.condition: toolRef is not covered by an activeToolGrantRef
rules.failureAction: deny tool call and emit authority evidence

rules.description: Every material workflow step must emit or reference evidence.
rules.failureAction: block demo acceptance until evidence is present

rules.description: Low-confidence or incomplete context must escalate to human review.
rules.condition: confidence is below threshold or required context is missing
rules.failureAction: route to human review and mark the workroom in review state
